creator: mekanix@privat.dk
text:
It can take me several tries to get KDE up and running. KDE bails out with the following error:

'Could not read connection list.
/home/joeuser/.DCOPserver_joeuser.my.domain_:0
Please check that the "decopserver" program is running.'

After 6-10 or more tries i finally get KDE running just to face another problem: I'm not greeted by KDE's welcome/startup-sound and AA is disabled. It takes another 2 or more tries before I get a complete KDE-session.

Note: The dcop-issue rarely reoccurs once I got one KDE-session running (w. or w/o AA etc.).

Following are 2 output for the dcop and AA/sound-attempts respectively:
